heading: MINERAL INTEREST HAVING VALUE OF LESS THAN $500
operative_text: (a) A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of a mineral interest the person owns if the interest has a taxable value of less than $500. (b) The exemption provided by Subsection (a) applies to each separate taxing unit in which a person owns a mineral interest and, for the purposes of Subsection (a), all mineral interests in each taxing unit are aggregated to determine value.
_note: No external cross-references found; Subsection (a) referenced internally within (b). No defined terms appear in this section; terms such as "mineral interest" and "taxable value" are used without in-section definitions.
